meaning: n.锅柄,狭长的土地v.行乞,讨钱
examples: WHY does Oklahoma have that panhandle?
He remembered how when they reached Amarillo they went north up into the panhandle.
Oil appears to have reached beaches and barrier islands in Alabama and the western Panhandle of Florida.
Nortex Communications and Panhandle Telecommunication Systems, Inc. closed on their respective purchases this week.
When the 20-year-old airman died while undergoing training in Florida's panhandle, his death was shocking enough.
